exploration_context: Fresh Go 1.26 project, ground zero - no legacy constraints

top_ideas.name: QMRS (QUIC Multiplexed Resilient Sessions)
top_ideas.description: QUIC流复用+会话自愈，会话与连接解耦，网络切换无缝恢复
top_ideas.key_innovation: 继承HTTP/3理念，首次应用于交互式shell场景

top_ideas.name: AICSM (AI-Copilot Shell Mesh)
top_ideas.description: AI原生架构，命令实时语义分析，异常行为模式识别，自然语言查询历史
top_ideas.key_innovation: AI作为一等协议公民嵌入协议层

top_ideas.name: EPSG (Edge-P2P Shell Grid)
top_ideas.description: WebRTC P2P直连，服务器仅做信令协调，支持临时会话链接
top_ideas.key_innovation: 去中心化数据传输，零配置远程支持

top_ideas.name: ZKSA (ZK-Shell Authentication)
top_ideas.description: 零知识证明身份体系，无需证书密码，验证知识而非凭证
top_ideas.key_innovation: 彻底颠覆SSH密钥管理范式

top_ideas.name: ECS (Ephemeral Container Shell)
top_ideas.description: Serverless架构，无持久守护进程，每次连接触发容器冷启动
top_ideas.key_innovation: 天然隔离、弹性伸缩、按量计费

key_recommendations: Transport: TLS 1.3 over TCP (net.Conn), WebSocket fallback
Protocol: Custom binary framing with channel multiplexing
Auth: TLS mTLS for automation, JWT for interactive users
PTY: creack/pty for Unix, ConPTY for Windows 10+
CLI: Cobra for client, std flag for server
risks: Windows PTY incompatibility - Detect version, graceful degradation
NAT traversal / Firewall blocking - WebSocket fallback
Session state corruption - Immutable events with checksums

architecture_layers.command: PTY fork+exec vs Raw exec based on TTY need

systematic.scalability: Horizontal via Redis shared state, federation mode for multi-region

convergent_themes: Certificate-based auth (pragmatic systematic) vs ZK (creative only)
